name: innocraft-marketplace
description: Backend development plugins for Claude Code - Neon PostgreSQL, Convex, and more

plugins.name: neon
plugins.description: Complete Neon serverless PostgreSQL integration - Drizzle ORM, serverless driver, ephemeral databases, Neon Auth, unified SDK, MCP server, and vector/RAG with hybrid search

plugins.name: convex
plugins.description: Complete Convex backend development - functions (queries, mutations, actions), database (schema, indexes), Convex Auth, file storage, scheduling, and real-time reactive backends

plugins.name: kenya-payments
plugins.description: Complete Kenya payments integration - Kopokopo (K2 Connect), Safaricom Daraja (M-Pesa), Pesapal API 3.0, and Intasend. STK Push, B2C, C2B, webhooks, bank payouts.

plugins.name: kra-etims
plugins.description: KRA eTIMS (Electronic Tax Invoice Management System) integration for Kenya tax compliance. OSCU/VSCU integration, invoice submission, stock management, item classification.

plugins.name: whatsapp-business
plugins.description: WhatsApp Business Cloud API integration - messaging, templates, webhooks, interactive messages. Send notifications, handle customer inquiries, and automate conversations.
